question: Among agencies appearing in the top 20 for total January parking-violation fine amounts in each year from the year (within 2017-2022) with the highest total gasoline/gasohol sales across U.S. states to two years later, and that are U.S. national law-enforcement bodies, which agency had the highest average number of January moving violations across those years? Return the agency name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact: Filtering fuel_type = "Gasoline/gasohol" and summing value by year (from date) for 2017-2022, the maximum total is 294719877886 in 2019.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2017-2022 has the highest total gasoline/gasohol sales across U.S. states? (Filter fuel_type == "Gasoline/gasohol"; derive year from date; sum value by year and select the maximum.)

2.subquestion: Which agencies were in the top 20 for total January parking-violation fine amount in <node_1 answer>? (Filter for this node: group by ISSUING_AGENCY_NAME; sum FINE_AMOUNT; rank desc; take top 20.)
answer: UNVRSTY OF THE D.C. SECURITY POLICE
